confidence.explanation: All 5 core ACs verified via live API (GET /so/invoice?booking_id=8 returns location.email=info@totemlodge.com and location.website=www.totemlodge.com) and Invoice Preview UI modal (both fields rendered with correct icons). All 11 location fields present — no regression. UV-3 asset scan, UV-5 accessibility scan, and UV-6 snapshot drift were not executed (tooling unavailable headlessly). Core deduction: 0. UV gap deduction: -18 (3 UV TCs blocked).

test_cases.title: GET /so/invoice returns location.email field
test_cases.note: location.email='info@totemlodge.com' present in GET /so/invoice?booking_id=8 response. HTTP 200. Confirmed via in-page fetch with bearer token.

test_cases.title: GET /so/invoice returns location.website field
test_cases.note: location.website='www.totemlodge.com' present in GET /so/invoice?booking_id=8 response. HTTP 200.

test_cases.title: Existing location fields remain present and unaffected
test_cases.note: All 11 location fields present: name, address_line1, address_line2, city, state_prov, country, postal_zip, phone_number, mobile_number, email, website. No regression.

test_cases.title: Invoice render page displays location email
test_cases.note: Invoice Preview dialog shows 'info@totemlodge.com' with mail icon in location header. Confirmed via Playwright snapshot ref e304/e305/e306.

test_cases.title: Invoice render page displays location website
test_cases.note: Invoice Preview dialog shows 'www.totemlodge.com' with global icon in location header. Confirmed via Playwright snapshot ref e299/e300/e301.

test_cases.title: Console Error Scan
test_cases.note: 1 allowlisted error: Cognito favicon 404 (https://xin-auth-np.auth.ca-central-1.amazoncognito.com/favicon.ico). No app-originated console errors.

test_cases.title: Network Error Scan
test_cases.note: All 4 xin-api-np.wbee.ca calls returned 200: GET /user/profile, POST /booking/search, GET /so/invoice?booking_id=8, POST /inventory/search. non-2xx.json is empty.
